//: This repo is the marketing website only. It does NOT own any Firebase backend. All Firestore/Storage rules, indexes, and marketplace seeding live in the Archie app repo (single source of truth, deployed by its firebase-deploy.yml). The pages here use Firebase only at runtime via the client SDK (auth, Firestore reads, submission uploads) — nothing to deploy. The site itself ships via GitHub Pages (see .github/workflows/deploy.yml), so this hosting block is only for local `firebase serve`.
